mapper.select: SELECT unit_cd, barcode, pack_qty, is_base_unit FROM om_product_unit WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.update: UPDATE om_product_unit SET unit_cd = #{unitCd}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_base_unit = true
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO om_product_unit (product_id, unit_cd, barcode, pack_qty, is_base_unit, sort_order) VALUES
(#{productId}, #{u.unitCd}, #{u.barcode}, #{u.packQty}1, #{u.isBaseUnit}, 0)

INSERT INTO om_product_unit (product_id, unit_cd, barcode, pack_qty, is_base_unit, sort_order) VALUES
(#{row.productId}, #{row.unitCd}, #{row.barcode}, COALESCE(#{row.packQty}, 1), COALESCE(#{row.isBaseUnit}, false), 0)
